description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly black and white color scheme accented by bold orange panels and blue-tinted cockpit glass. The wings are sharply swept back and feature integrated winglets, giving the aircraft an aggressive, high-performance appearance. The fuselage is compact and angular, with visible panel lines and surface details suggesting advanced composite construction. Two prominent jet engines are mounted at the rear, flanking a central tail section with a single vertical stabilizer. The landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, appearing robust and suited for urban or short-runway operations. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed by a blue-tinted canopy, and likely designed for a single pilot.
description: A futuristic, angular black and white airplane with orange accents, swept-back wings, and a blue-tinted forward cockpit canopy. Twin rear jet engines and a single vertical stabilizer complete its high-tech look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings with orange and white paneling.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular fuselage, forward cockpit, and visible landing gear beneath the body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin jet engines, single vertical stabilizer, and the full span of the swept-back wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit placement, landing gear, and detailed paneling along the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept with integrated winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted on either side of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear, with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
